title: Possible to create "Blank" Gantt charts? not using Calendar names; no month names, just generic month 1, 2, etc
excerpt: Can I produce Gantt charts that are ‘generic’ and not using Calendar dates; so “month 1” instead of “April”

posts.author: HYPRfrivera (Francis K. Rivera)
posts.cookedHtml: Can I produce Gantt charts that are ‘generic’ and not using Calendar dates; so “month 1” instead of “April”
